sessions.title: Chat Session
sessions.description: A collection of chat sessions for each user.

title.description: The title of the chat session.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the session.

mode.description: The chat mode used in the session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the session was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the session was last updated.

messages.title: Message
messages.description: A collection of messages within a chat session.

sessionId.description: The ID of the session this message belongs to.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the message.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

modelId.description: The ID of the model that generated the message (if assistant).

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

thinking.description: The thinking process of the AI model.
